features: The medium toothbrush with All Around Clean technology has perfectly designed bristles to clean between teeth and along the gum line
Designed to be effective on the natural contours of your teeth and helps provide fresh breath
description: Directions Directions for use: The medium toothbrush with All Around Clean technology has perfectly designed bristles to clean between the teeth and along the gum line. Designed to be effective on the natural contours of your teeth and helps provide fresh breath. This mega pack contains 3 toothbrushes. Safety Warning Do not allow young children to play with or swallow the toothbrush head. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble, 65823 Schwalbach/Ts., Germany See more
